articles.title: ‘It’s about my life’: Why acclaimed Cambridge wine bar Dear Annie is closing

articles.title: Judge orders E. Jean Carroll be paid $5.8 million in Trump sex abuse and defamation case; Trump appeals
articles.description:
The jury found Trump attacked Carroll in 1996 in the dressing room of a luxury Manhattan department store, and defamed her after she described it publicly in a 2019 memoir, during his first term as president.

The post Judge orders E. Jean Carroll be paid $5.8 million in Trump sex abuse and defamation case; Trump appeals appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Judge orders Trump to pay E. Jean Carroll $5.8 million for defamation and sexual assault.
Jury found Trump attacked Carroll in 1996 at a Manhattan department store dressing room.
Trump's appeal may delay Carroll's compensation, affecting local discussions on sexual assault accountability.
